programme.desc: S1 E2058 Anupamaa sacrifices her personal ambitions to dedicate her life to her family. However, she eventually decides to live on her own terms after failing to receive credit for her many trials.
programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.desc: S2 E330 Tulsi and Mihir Virani navigate the ensuing challenges that emerge in their family which has endured a lengthy passage of time.
programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.desc: S1 E96 After leaving Akshay and Madhavi at the boarding school, an emotional Vrinda takes over as the new boss of the Jamshedpur plant.
programme.title: Kyunki Rishton Ke Bhi Roop Badalte Hain

programme.desc: S1 E22 Single mother Dr. Noyonika helps pop star sensation Ishaan regain his voice, to the delight of her daughter. But tensions rise as they fall for each other.
programme.title: Sairaab

programme.desc: S1 E75 Virat is an IPS officer who loves Pakhi deeply. However, things become complicated when he has to let go of his love, Pakhi, and marry Sai.
programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin

programme.desc: S1 E56 Kokila reprimands Gopi for selling utensils to a stranger and confines her in a room. Rashi comes to Gopi's aid and advises her to escape.
programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya
